mapper.select: SELECT event_type AS k, count(*) AS cnt FROM ${t} GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT (payload_json::jsonb)->'alert'->>'severity' AS k, count(*) AS cnt FROM ${t} WHERE event_type = 'alert' AND (payload_json::jsonb)->'alert'->>'severity' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY k ORDER BY k
SELECT COALESCE((payload_json::jsonb)->>'app_proto', lower(proto), 'unknown') AS k, count(*) AS cnt FROM ${t} GROUP BY k ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT src_ip::text AS src_ip, dest_ip::text AS dest_ip, count(*) AS cnt FROM ${t} GROUP BY src_ip, dest_ip ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT src_ip::text AS src_ip, NULL::text AS dest_ip, count(*) AS cnt FROM ${t} GROUP BY src_ip ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT NULL::text AS src_ip, dest_ip::text AS dest_ip, count(*) AS cnt FROM ${t} GROUP BY dest_ip ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, "timestamp", src_ip::text AS src_ip, src_port, dest_ip::text AS dest_ip, dest_port, proto, (payload_json::jsonb)->'alert'->>'signature' AS signature, ((payload_json::jsonb)->'alert'->>'severity')::int AS severity, (payload_json::jsonb)->'alert'->>'category' AS category FROM ${t} WHERE event_type = 'alert' ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT #{limit}
